details: The agent executed the list_issues API call against openclaw/openclaw with state=open, orderBy=CREATED_AT, direction=desc, perPage=1 to get the most recent issue. The command returned issue #53463 titled '[Bug]: Pre-compaction memory flush can overwrite memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md instead of appending', which the agent correctly reported. The answer is based on actual command execution, not hallucination.
